description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linting that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: iwyu and format. The iwyu job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with debian:sid-slim image, installing dependencies, checking out source and submodules, configuring and building with CMake, and checking the build output for IWYU. The format job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the source, installs clang-format-11, and runs it on relevant files, checking for changes.
